changes: ⚡ Hybrid Data Sync: Added GitHub-first loading with internal caching for faster performance and offline support.
🧼 Data Cleanup: Removed old legacy files and fixed character display errors (encoding artifacts).
🔄 Force Refresh: Added a new settings option to manually pull the latest materials from GitHub.
🗑️ Data Reset: Added the ability to clear cache and reset the database directly from Settings.
🚀 Stability: Fixed background sync bugs and improved app reliability.
title: Smart Data & Clean UI
